## Blocking Findings

### [correctness/requirements] Ship completion command is not wired to mark ready-for-merge — `roles/ship.md:45`

The ship role's completion instructions tell the agent to call
`pan admin specialists done ship {{issueId}} --status passed`, but this is
not wired to transition the issue into a ready-for-merge state. Until the
ship completion path drives the ready-for-merge transition, approved branches
will not surface on the Awaiting Merge view and the pipeline halts after ship.

## Non-blocking Findings
None recorded — user directed the synthesis directly to the blocking finding above.

## Clean Sub-roles
None — convoy reviewers were superseded by the user-identified blocker.

Source: /home/eltmon/Projects/panopticon-cli/workspaces/feature-pan-1107/.pan/review/agent-pan-1107-review-ad323088/synthesis.md

## Required action

Fix every blocking review finding, commit the fixes, then re-request review with:

`pan review request PAN-1107 -m "Fixed review issues"`
